integrations.name: Hello Solar (C)
integrations.description: ARMv7 binary integration template. Same demo as hello-solar.sh but as a single pre-built binary with no shell / nc / curl dependency. Recommended starting point for new integrations.
integrations.author: freetoon team

integrations.name: Hello Solar (example)
integrations.description: Minimal example that publishes a fake solar-production value every 10 s. Use as a starting point for your own integration.
integrations.author: freetoon team

integrations.name: OpenWeather (example)
integrations.description: Polls openweathermap.org and publishes current temp + humidity. Demonstrates an API-driven integration with a config file.
integrations.author: freetoon team
